---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Speedify2
labels: enhancement
---

## Feature Description

Describe the feature you want clearly and concisely.

## Why It Would Be Useful

Explain why this feature would benefit users of Speedify2.

## Example Use Case

Provide a concrete example of how this feature would be used.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
